title: Profile of social network users
body: ![Profiles of social network users in Europe](http://www.xarop.com/img/user_profile_chart.jpg) In this chart we can see that the majority of social network users in Europe, 53%, only enter to browse (*spectators*), only 10% create content (*creators*) which is commented on by 19% (*critics*), 9% are subscribed to RSS, vote or add tags (*collectors*), 13% of registered users do not participate (*joiners*) and 40% enter simply to watch (*spectators*). We can specify these results according to age, location and gender [here](http://www.forrester.com/Groundswell/profile_tool.html) and an explanation of the various types of users in [this presentation](http://www.forrester.com/Groundswell/ladder.html). Source: [*Forrester*](http://www.forrester.com) // < !\],>
